---
title: "Pre-Departure Checklist"
subtitle: "Everything to do before June 5, 2026"
categories: [planning, checklist]
toc: true
toc-depth: 2
---

::: {.callout-note}
## Already Booked — Do Not Re-Book

- ✅ **Outbound flights** (FMWYOJ): MSN → ORD → Frankfurt → Florence, Jun 5–6
- ✅ **Return flights** (FMWYOJ): Brindisi → Munich → Chicago → Madison, Jun 20
- ✅ **Florence → Naples train** (PIDCMA): Italo #8902, Jun 10, departs 12:28pm, arrives 3:28pm — Salotto 1, seats 1 & 2
- ✅ **Naples → Brindisi flights** (IXYZMT): AZ 1270 NAP→FCO 3:05pm + AZ 1623 FCO→BDS 5:15pm, Jun 13
:::

---

## Museum & Attraction Tickets

Book these as soon as possible — June is peak season and timed slots fill weeks ahead.

### Florence (Days 3–5, Jun 7–9)

| Priority | Attraction | Day | Date | Cost |
|----------|-----------|-----|------|------|
| 🔴 **Book Now** | Duomo Complex combo (dome climb) | Day 3 | Sun Jun 7 | €30 |
| 🔴 **Book Now** | Uffizi Gallery (timed entry) | Day 3 | Sun Jun 7 | ~€20 |
| 🔴 **Book Now** | Galleria dell'Accademia (David) | Day 4 | Mon Jun 8 | €20 + €4 booking |
| 🟡 Soon | Medici Chapels | Day 4 | Mon Jun 8 | ~€9 |
| 🟢 Optional | Basilica di San Lorenzo / Laurentian Library | Day 4 | Mon Jun 8 | Varies |
| 🟢 Optional | Palazzo Vecchio | Day 4 | Mon Jun 8 | ~€14 |
| 🟢 Optional | Museum of San Marco | Day 4 or 5 | Mon–Tue | €4 (closed Tues) |

**See:** [Florence Tickets page](tickets-florence.qmd) for booking links

- [ ] Book **Uffizi Gallery** timed entry for Jun 7
- [ ] Book **Duomo Complex** combo ticket / dome climb for Jun 7
- [ ] Book **Galleria dell'Accademia** (David) for Jun 8
- [ ] Book **Medici Chapels** for Jun 8
- [ ] Decide on optional museums and book if desired

### Naples (Days 7–9, Jun 11–13)

| Priority | Attraction | Day | Date | Cost |
|----------|-----------|-----|------|------|
| 🔴 **Book Now** | Cappella Sansevero (Veiled Christ) | Day 8 | Fri Jun 12 | €9 |
| 🟡 Soon | Herculaneum (Parco Archeologico) | Day 7 | Thu Jun 11 | ~€13 |
| 🟡 Soon | MANN Museum | Day 8 | Fri Jun 12 | €18 |
| 🟢 Optional | Napoli Sotterranea (10am slot) | Day 9 morning | Sat Jun 13 | ~€10 |

::: {.callout-warning}
## Cappella Sansevero — Book Immediately

This tiny chapel (Veiled Christ sculpture) has extremely limited timed slots and sells out weeks in advance. Book before anything else on this list.
:::

**See:** [Naples Tickets page](tickets-naples.qmd) for booking links

- [ ] Book **Cappella Sansevero** timed entry for Jun 12 ← **Do this first**
- [ ] Book **Herculaneum** entry for Jun 11 (confirm if guided tour includes admission)
- [ ] Book **MANN Museum** for Jun 12 (walk-in sometimes possible but reserve to be safe)
- [ ] Book **Napoli Sotterranea** 10am slot for Jun 13 (optional — flight is 3pm, fits comfortably)

---

## Accommodations

Confirm all hotel bookings, check-in times, and checkout deadlines.

| City | Check-In | Check-Out | Nights | Note |
|------|----------|-----------|--------|------|
| **Florence** | Sat Jun 6 ~7:00pm | Wed Jun 10 (morning) | 4 | Train departs 12:28pm — check out by 11am |
| **Naples** | Wed Jun 10 ~4:00pm | Sat Jun 13 (morning) | 3 | Flight at 3pm — check out by noon; ask for luggage storage |
| **Brindisi/Puglia** | Sat Jun 13 ~7:30pm | Sat Jun 20 (~8am) | 6 | BDS flight 10:55am — depart hotel by 8:15am |

- [ ] **Florence hotel**: confirm reservation; note Jun 6 arrival ~7pm after long travel day
- [ ] **Naples hotel**: confirm reservation; note Jun 13 checkout by noon for 3pm flight
- [ ] **Brindisi/Puglia accommodations**: confirm all nights Jun 13–19; note very early Jun 20 checkout

---

## Tours

- [ ] **Herculaneum guided tour** — book licensed guide for Jun 11; get meeting time/place in writing
- [ ] **Puglia organized tour** — confirm tour operator; get daily schedule for Jun 15–19; confirm pickup/meeting details for each day
- [ ] Save guide and tour operator phone numbers to your phone and written on paper

---

## Restaurant Reservations

June is busy — reserve ahead for any restaurant worth going to.

### Florence

- [ ] **Bistecca alla fiorentina dinner** — book a proper Florentine steakhouse for one evening (Days 3–6); ask hotel concierge for current best
- [ ] Any other special dinners — ask hotel on arrival for current favorites

### Naples

- [ ] **50 Kalò** (upscale pizza, Via Serapide 1) — reserve in advance for any night
- [ ] Special seafood dinner on Lungomare — consider reserving for evening of Jun 12

---

## Documents & Administration

- [ ] Verify **both passports are valid** at least 6 months beyond Jun 20, 2026 (valid through Dec 2026+)
- [ ] Purchase **travel insurance**: medical coverage, trip cancellation, baggage/delay
- [ ] **Notify credit card companies** of travel dates: Italy, Germany — and confirm no foreign transaction fees
- [ ] Identify a **backup credit card** and notify that bank too
- [ ] Get some **euros in cash** before departing (~€100–200 for first day logistics before finding ATMs)

**Documents to print and carry (keep in carry-on, NOT checked bag):**

- [ ] Outbound flight reservation (FMWYOJ): MSN→ORD→FRA→FLR
- [ ] Return flight reservation (FMWYOJ): BDS→MUC→ORD→MSN
- [ ] Naples→Brindisi flight reservation (IXYZMT)
- [ ] Italo train ticket (PIDCMA) — or save as PDF on phone
- [ ] Florence hotel confirmation
- [ ] Naples hotel confirmation
- [ ] Brindisi/Puglia hotel confirmation(s)
- [ ] Emergency contacts: hotel addresses, tour guide phone numbers
- [ ] Photocopies of both passports (stored separately from originals)
- [ ] [June calendar](june-calendar.qmd) (print from this site)
- [ ] Key itinerary pages (Days 1–2 flight details, Day 9 flight to Brindisi)

---

## Phone & Technology

- [ ] **International phone/data plan** — confirm Italy coverage; add international data package if needed
- [ ] Download **offline maps** for Florence, Naples, and Brindisi (Google Maps — do at home, not the airport; large files)
- [ ] Download **Google Translate** Italian language pack for offline use
- [ ] Download **Trenitalia app** (useful for Naples Circumvesuviana updates)
- [ ] Download **Lufthansa app** — check in for flights 24 hours before departure
- [ ] Download **ITA Airways app** or save AZ boarding passes for Jun 13 flights
- [ ] Download entertainment for long flights: shows, podcasts, audiobooks (≥9 hours of content for transatlantic)
- [ ] Test that all chargers and cables work; bring spares for anything critical

---

## Health & Wellness

- [ ] Check if any travel vaccinations are recommended (hepatitis A, etc.) — schedule doctor visit if needed
- [ ] **Refill all regular medications** — pack enough for the full 16 days plus a buffer; carry ALL medication in your carry-on (not checked)
- [ ] Pack a small travel kit: ibuprofen, antihistamine, blister pads, antidiarrheal tablets, band-aids
- [ ] Purchase **compression socks** for the transatlantic flights (LH 0433 and UA 8855 are 8–9 hour flights)
- [ ] Confirm travel insurance covers emergency medical evacuation

---

## Packing

See the full [Packing List](packing-list.qmd) for a comprehensive item-by-item list.

**Pre-packing tasks:**

- [ ] Weigh all bags — checked max **23kg (50 lbs)** per person; carry-on max **8kg (18 lbs)**
- [ ] Buy a **universal travel adapter** if you don't have one — Italy uses Type L / F outlets (Type C adapter works)
- [ ] **Break in any new walking shoes now** — 10,000+ steps/day in Florence and Naples; do not arrive with new shoes
- [ ] Test all electronics: camera, batteries, cables — charge everything before packing

---

## One Week Before Departure (by May 29)

- [ ] Reconfirm all hotel reservations (email or call each)
- [ ] Reconfirm Herculaneum guided tour — get exact meeting time/place
- [ ] Reconfirm Puglia tour operator — confirm Jun 15–19 schedule
- [ ] Check weather forecast for Florence, Naples, and Brindisi
- [ ] Finalize packing; weigh bags

## Day Before Departure (Jun 4)

- [ ] Final bag check — weigh both checked bags one last time
- [ ] All museum/flight/train tickets accessible on phone (screenshot each as backup)
- [ ] Passport, boarding passes, and credit cards in carry-on — confirmed
- [ ] Arrange transportation to Madison Airport for **3:45pm** (2 hrs before 5:45pm MSN flight)
- [ ] Set **two alarms** — this is the one flight that cannot be missed
- [ ] Check MSN → ORD and ORD → FRA (LH 0433) flight status
- [ ] Charge all devices to 100%
- [ ] Empty refrigerator of perishables
- [ ] Arrange pet/plant care — confirm with whoever is handling it
- [ ] Set home thermostat, lock windows and doors
- [ ] Leave full itinerary + hotel contacts with a trusted contact at home
